overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, crossing a neon-lit intersection and proceeding along a covered sidewalk beneath towering buildings with massive digital billboards. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring futuristic vehicles, pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, and a moody atmosphere with reflective wet surfaces.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide futuristic intersection at night, rain falling on wet asphalt that reflects the glow of streetlights and neon signs. The camera walks forward across a broad yellow-striped crosswalk toward a prominent red 'soft sys' neon sign hanging above the street, while futuristic vehicles pass by on the right.

agents.ego_description: turning onto the sidewalk and walking alongside the concrete wall while pedestrians with umbrellas appear ahead

notable_agents.action: person holding a glowing purple neon umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete wall running along the left side of the sidewalk
distinctive illuminated purple umbrella with neon frame held by pedestrian ahead
tall pole with bright floodlight illuminating the street and sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right from the open intersection onto a covered sidewalk, transitioning from the wide street to a more enclosed walkway. A concrete retaining wall appears on the left while the street continues on the right. A pedestrian with a distinctive glowing purple neon umbrella becomes visible ahead, walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban walkway beneath overpass with towering digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk following the person with the purple neon umbrella, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with glowing purple neon umbrella walking ahead, occasionally shifting position

entered.detail: tall building facade covered with multiple large vertical digital advertisement screens displaying colorful content
yellow textured guidance strips embedded in the concrete sidewalk surface

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered sidewalk beneath an overpass structure, the camera follows the person with the purple neon umbrella. To the right, a towering building displays massive vertical digital billboards illuminating the misty air. Other pedestrians with various colored umbrellas walk in the opposite direction, while futuristic cars continue to pass on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved sidewalk along dark monolithic building with small illuminated windows

events.description: sidewalk curves gently to the right while maintaining forward progress

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk section, passing other pedestrians while the purple umbrella moves to the right side of the frame

entered.detail: large dark building with grid pattern of small illuminated yellow windows
angled corner of building ahead with large digital screens and architectural details

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk curves gently to the right alongside a massive dark monolithic building with small glowing windows. The person with the purple neon umbrella has moved to the right side of the frame and continues walking ahead. The environment feels more enclosed as the camera approaches the corner of the building, with fewer vehicles visible on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked futuristic intersection into the enclosed corridors of a neon-lit urban district. It begins by crossing a broad yellow-striped crosswalk under the glow of a red soft sys sign, with futuristic vehicles passing through the reflective wet asphalt. As the camera turns right, the open street transitions into a covered sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall, where a pedestrian with a glowing purple neon umbrella appears ahead. The scene then expands beneath an overpass, following the purple umbrella past towering buildings adorned with massive vertical digital billboards that illuminate the misty air. Finally, the walkway curves gently alongside a dark monolithic building with small glowing windows, narrowing the environment as the camera rounds the corner.
